message:
feat(core,fuse): split ioctl into read/write request classification, add btrfs FIEMAP support

Split RequestOp::Ioctl into IoctlRead and IoctlWrite so that mutating
ioctls (EXT4_IOC_SETFLAGS) correctly acquire write request scopes with
transaction allocation and backpressure semantics, while read-only ioctls
(FIEMAP, EXT4_IOC_GETFLAGS) remain snapshot-only.

Refactor ext4 FIEMAP into a dedicated method and add btrfs FIEMAP
implementation that walks extent data items from the fs tree (both
mutable alloc-state and read-only tree paths).

Update FUSE ioctl dispatch to use the new IoctlRead/IoctlWrite ops, add
mock begin/end_request_scope to FUSE ioctl tests to verify correct scope
lifecycle, and extend core tests for the new RequestOp variants across
is_write, backpressure, and proptest coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
